comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: cargo publish --locked failed: no token found. Need crates.io API token in CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN or run 'cargo login'.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: cargo publish blocked: crates.io requires a verified email for this account. Publishing attempt returned 400 Bad Request with message 'A verified email address is required to publish crates to crates.io'. Need to verify email at https://crates.io/settings/profile then rerun cargo publish --locked.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: cargo package --locked succeeds; cargo publish --locked completes; crate page shows correct metadata and README; release tag pushed to origin.
custom.beads_notes:
Requires crates.io token in env CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN; run from rust/ directory.
Initiating crate publish work; see AGENTS instructions: no backward compatibility; will follow cargo package/publish flow.
Publish blocked: crates.io account email not verified. Verify email then rerun cargo publish --locked with token loaded.
Email verified on crates.io; retrying cargo publish.
Published taskulus 0.1.0 to crates.io after category fix; cargo search/info shows crate available with MIT license, homepage/docs links, command-line-utilities category.
